input.title: Enterprise Job Portal & Applicant Tracking System (ATS)
input.description: A comprehensive two-sided marketplace connecting job seekers with prospective employers. Job seekers can build their digital resumes, search for opportunities, apply with one click, and access salary insights. Employers utilize a built-in Applicant Tracking System (ATS) to post jobs, manage candidate pipelines via Kanban boards, parse uploaded resumes via OCR, and automate interview scheduling. The platform leans heavily on AI-driven matching algorithms to score candidate suitability for specific job postings.

user_classes.Job Seeker: An individual user searching for open positions, building their profile, and submitting applications.
user_classes.Employer / Recruiter: A company representative who posts job requirements, reviews candidate applications, schedules interviews, and manages company branding.
user_classes.System Admin: A platform administrator responsible for general content moderation, managing billing disputes, resolving flagged postings, and monitoring overall system health.

definitions.ATS: Applicant Tracking System — a software application that enables the electronic handling of recruitment and hiring needs.
definitions.Resume Parser: An optical character recognition (OCR) and NLP engine that extracts structured data (education, skills, experience) from a raw PDF or DOCX file.
definitions.Easy Apply: A feature allowing seekers to submit an application using their saved platform profile rather than redirecting to an external site.

scope: Extensive job search interface powered by Elasticsearch for geographic and text relevance
Automated resume parsing utilizing machine learning models to extract metadata
Kanban-style candidate pipeline management for recruiters
Integrated live chat and automated email sequencing for interview coordination
Tiered subscription billing for employers (Pay-per-post and Unlimited monthly models)
Anonymous company reviews and crowdsourced salary data collection
out_of_scope: Fully integrated payroll and HRIS (Human Resources Information System) post-hire
Background check execution (system will only provide a placeholder flag, execution requires third-party API in v2)
Video streaming infrastructure for live interviews (will rely on generating links to external providers like Zoom/Google Meet)
constraints: Search results must render in under 500ms using Elasticsearch regardless of dataset size
Resume files uploaded by applicants must be heavily sanitized to prevent malicious execution
Candidate PII (Personally Identifiable Information) must be encrypted at rest and compliant with CCPA/GDPR

operating_environment.frontend: Next.js enabling server-side rendering (SSR) crucial for Job Posting SEO visibility.
operating_environment.backend: Python FastAPI powering the main microservices and Machine Learning inference pipelines.
operating_environment.database: MongoDB for flexible schema management of generic resumes, Redis for session states.

FR-01.title: Authentication & Dual Role Architecture
requirements: Users must select their account type explicitly upon registration (Job Seeker vs Employer)
Authentication leverages JWTs securely stored in HttpOnly cookies
Social login integrations are supported for Google and LinkedIn
Employers are required to verify their corporate email domain before publishing jobs

FR-02.title: Job Seeker Profile Builder
requirements: Seekers construct profiles featuring Education, Experience, Skills, Certifications, and Portfolios
A visual progress bar encourages users to reach 100% profile completion
Seekers can toggle their profile visibility between 'Publicly Searchable' or 'Private/Direct Apply Only'

FR-03.title: AI Resume Parsing engine
requirements: Seekers uploading a PDF or DOCX resume trigger an NLP parsing engine
The engine extracts text and automatically maps it into the Seeker Profile fields sequentially
Users are prompted to manually review and edit the parsed data for inaccuracies

FR-04.title: Employer Company Profile
requirements: Employers construct a company page featuring a logo, banner, 'About Us' section, and employee benefits
The company profile aggregates all active job postings natively
System links verified employees automatically to the company page roster

FR-05.title: Job Posting Workflow
requirements: Employers create job drafts requiring Title, Location (Remote/On-site), Salary Range, Description, and required Skills
System must highlight specific keyword recommendations to optimize posting visibility
Publishing a job requires an active subscription or a successful single-post payment processing

FR-06.title: Advanced Search & Filters
requirements: Seekers query a global search bar matching job titles, skills, or company names
Results map precisely to geographic filters supporting 'Within X miles' radius logic
Users can filter by job type (Contract, Full-time), Salary bounds, and 'Easy Apply' availability

FR-07.title: AI Candidate Matchmaking
requirements: Algorithm calculates a 'Match Percentage' comparing Seeker skills against Job Posting requirements
High match percentages subtly boost a job's ranking in the Seeker's customized daily feed
Employers see a prioritized list of 'Recommended Candidates' for their active roles

FR-08.title: Application Workflow (Easy Apply)
requirements: Seekers apply instantly using their stored profile, avoiding external redirects
The workflow allows optional attachment of a custom Cover Letter or supplemental portfolio link
Submission immediately triggers a confirmation email and appends the record to the Seeker's 'Applied Jobs' tracking tab

FR-09.title: Employer ATS Kanban Board
requirements: Employers view applicants within a specific job posting on a drag-and-drop Kanban board
Default columns include 'In Review', 'Sourced', 'Interview', 'Offer', and 'Rejected'
Dragging a candidate to 'Rejected' prompts an optional automated courteous rejection email dispatch

FR-10.title: Saved Jobs & Alerts
requirements: Seekers can bookmark postings to a 'Saved Jobs' list for future review
Users can save specific search parameters (e.g., 'React Developer in Austin') and subscribe to a Daily or Weekly digest email containing new matches

FR-11.title: Interview Scheduling Configuration
requirements: Employers can connect Google Workspace or Microsoft Outlook calendars via OAuth
Moving a candidate to the 'Interview' stage generates a Calendly-style link allowing the seeker to pick an available 30-minute block
Confirmation automatically dispatches calendar invites containing Zoom/Meet links to both parties

FR-12.title: Skill Assessments & Challenges
requirements: Employers can mandate a short multiple-choice technical or behavioral quiz upon application
The platform evaluates the quiz dynamically, appending the score directly onto the candidate's ATS card
Seekers can optionally take standardized platform tests (e.g., 'Python Basics') to earn verified badges on their profile

FR-13.title: Anonymous Company Reviews
requirements: Verified current or former employees can leave 1-5 star ratings identifying Work-Life Balance, Compensation, and Management
Reviews strictly mandate a minimum character count and undergo an automated profanity check before visibility
Employers access a verified portal to publicly reply to reviews

FR-14.title: Salary Insights Collection
requirements: Seekers conditionally input anonymous salary data for their roles in exchange for unlocking aggregate insights
Algorithm normalizes inputs, throwing out statistical outliers organically
Provides a dynamic graph indicating the 25th, 50th, and 75th percentiles of compensation for specific job titles by major city

FR-15.title: Direct Messaging & Chat
requirements: Employers can initiate direct text chats with applicants who pass the initial screening phase
The application secures sender identities conditionally to prevent spam, rejecting attachments naturally to mitigate malware
Both parties receive push/email notifications for unread chat bubbles

FR-16.title: Employer Subscriptions & Billing
requirements: Integration with Stripe enabling Employers to purchase single 'Post Credits' or subscribe to limitless monthly Enterprise tiers
Invoices generate seamlessly to the account billing portal in PDF formats
Cancelled subscriptions gracefully lapse at the term’s end without interrupting active standard listings

FR-17.title: Analytics Dashboard for Employers
requirements: Visual graph depicting total views, clicks, and apply-rates horizontally across active postings
Provides funnel statistics quantifying the drop-off rate between 'Views' and 'Started Application'
Allows data export to standard CSV matrices

FR-18.title: Resume Data Export
requirements: Employers can bulk-select candidates from a specific ATS column and export their metadata into a zipped array of raw resumes and parsed CSV logic
Action strictly tracks into an audit log to maintain compliance protocols

FR-19.title: Admin Moderation & Dispute Handling
requirements: System Admins view a specialized queued list of 'Flagged' job postings reported by the community
Admins can temporarily suspend employers accused of multi-level marketing (MLM) schemes or fraudulent practices
Administrative actions issue systematic warnings via standardized email templates

FR-20.title: Diversity, Equity & Inclusion (DEI) Reporting
requirements: Seekers optionally input demographic data (Race, Gender, Veteran Status) safely isolated from the Employer's direct ATS view during screening
Employers receive heavily anonymized aggregate reports describing the funnel demographic split to audit hiring bias

NFR-01.title: Global Search Performance
requirements: Elasticsearch clusters must resolve complicated multivariable queries in under 500ms universally
Typeahead autocomplete results must invoke under 150ms limiting user interaction friction

NFR-02.title: SEO Discoverability
requirements: All public Job Detail pages must render statically natively supporting OpenGraph tags and precise Schema.org 'JobPosting' metadata ensuring rich results on Google Jobs Engine

system_attributes.security: Resume extraction models operate entirely in a sandboxed, ephemeral docker environment actively preventing macro-based malware execution upon upload.
system_attributes.scalability: Search indices shard geographically avoiding index exhaustion when supporting multinational localized job hunting parameters.

FR-01.title: Develop User Registration and Role Allocation API
FR-01.description: Construct FastAPI endpoints validating standard Email/Password inputs issuing HttpOnly JWTs. Mutate explicit Role definitions strictly within the claims enforcing separation between Employer and Seeker tables.
acceptance_criteria: Rejects registrations without specific explicit role flags natively.
Verifies unique emails cross-referencing collections globally.

FR-02.title: Design Profile Builder and Completion Wizard
FR-02.description: Design an interactive, clean profile wizard explicitly stepping seekers through varied components. Include visual elements dynamically filling a circular progress indicator based on required field arrays.
acceptance_criteria: Form supports heavily nested arrays for multiple work experiences.
Ensures inputs natively limit characters preventing visual dashboard blowout.

FR-03.title: Implement OCR Resume Parsing Pipeline
FR-03.description: Deploy an isolated microservice integrating Apache Tika or explicit AWS Textract reading uploaded PDFs mapping identified blocks heavily into a structured JSON string returning seamlessly to the client.
acceptance_criteria: Handles standard single-column and complex two-column structures efficiently.
Extracts 'Dates' and 'Company Names' into distinct keys securely.

FR-04.title: Develop Employer Branding Verification Sequence
FR-04.description: Build an interaction sequence forcing validation of the User's Domain Name matching explicitly against the requested Company Profile claiming rights before exposing brand management utilities natively.
acceptance_criteria: Prevents individuals claiming domains natively assigned generically (e.g. gmail.com).

FR-05.title: Construct Job Creation SEO Form Components
FR-05.description: Build the Next.js form supporting rich text descriptions. Integrate a side-panel dynamically displaying specific highly-searched keywords resolving relevantly based on the entered Job Title.
acceptance_criteria: Rich text explicitly filters dangerous XSS payloads before committing state.
Draft functionality permits abandoning flow maintaining inputs securely.

FR-06.title: Establish Elasticsearch Indices and Sync Logic
FR-06.description: Configure MongoDB connector securely synchronizing 'JobPostings' collections strictly onto localized Elasticsearch indices. Formulate complex generic multi-match query DSLs mapping text against location constraints simultaneously.
acceptance_criteria: Index mappings aggressively stem English words cleanly resolving 'Engineer' when querying 'Engineering'.

FR-07.title: Design Skill Matching Heuristic Algorithm
FR-07.description: Create python scoring functions executing dot product comparisons referencing seeker 'Skills' arrays natively against the Job Post 'Requirements' pushing a normalized 1-100% score dynamically.
acceptance_criteria: Normalizes synonymous string inputs resolving explicitly (e.g., 'React.js' = 'React').

FR-08.title: Implement Easy Apply Transaction Payload
FR-08.description: Wire the frontend 'Apply' button constructing massive JSON payloads referencing generic profile IDs resolving into Applicant Tracking pipelines seamlessly triggering async confirm emails simultaneously.
acceptance_criteria: Idempotency heavily strictly prevents users double-applying creating duplicates.

FR-09.title: Develop Drag and Drop ATS Kanban UI
FR-09.description: Implement React-beautiful-dnd explicitly driving customizable vertical columns natively rendering generic applicant snapshot cards cleanly handling drag events firing mutating APIs securely.
acceptance_criteria: Dropping heavily prompts explicit confirmation modal if state mutates natively triggering external rejection emails.

FR-10.title: Configure Job Alert Email Cron Workers
FR-10.description: Write isolated celery workers waking heavily daily running Elasticsearch queries matching explicitly saved parameters per User dispatching structured HTML emails aggregating new matches cleanly.
acceptance_criteria: Caps generic sent alerts resolving strictly to 1 combined payload natively per user.

FR-11.title: Integrate Google/Outlook Calendar OAuth
FR-11.description: Set up external OAuth apps securely negotiating generic read/write permissions directly generating event blocks containing isolated generic video link strings mapping natively.
acceptance_criteria: Refreshes tokens securely mitigating generic timeout failures seamlessly.

FR-12.title: Build Dynamic Assessment Quiz Interfaces
FR-12.description: Construct generic standardized quiz models rendering randomized questions cleanly imposing strict timer bounds securely resolving results pushing directly onto ATS cards natively.
acceptance_criteria: Navigating abruptly off-screen triggers generic auto-submit forcing strict compliance.

FR-13.title: Implement Moderated Review Pipeline
FR-13.description: Deploy generic profanity string arrays intersecting inputs isolating explicit flagged content immediately suspending publication forcing Administrator terminal inspections securely.
acceptance_criteria: Permits employers formal reply thread completely locked organically.

FR-14.title: Design Normalizing Salary Insights Graph
FR-14.description: Assemble data aggregation pipelines parsing generalized inputs rendering precise box-and-whisker plots securely depicting generic industry bounds explicitly.
acceptance_criteria: Ensures localized filtering seamlessly isolating granular geographic cost differences cleanly.

FR-15.title: Develop Applicant-Employer Messaging Bus
FR-15.description: Construct lightweight generic Websocket tunnels persisting chat logs isolating employer contact strings replacing generic names utilizing specific blind aliases natively until connection formally mutual.
acceptance_criteria: Emails explicit generic fallback notification completely if applicant disconnected extensively.

FR-16.title: Setup Stripe Subscription Portal Integrations
FR-16.description: Configure generic heavily tested webhooks securely matching isolated Local generic Employer schemas granting/revoking precise 'Publishing Credits' dynamically matching billing realities effortlessly.
acceptance_criteria: Discards posting inputs generically informing strict Paywall limits if depleted.

FR-17.title: Construct Employer Funnel Analytics Dashboard
FR-17.description: Leverage Recharts generic library completely rendering simple generic funnels visually interpreting raw arrays into actionable graphical insights easily consumed implicitly.
acceptance_criteria: Supports timeframe modification dynamically recalculating entirely organically.

FR-18.title: Build Zipped Resume Export Logic
FR-18.description: Write generic python generators buffering individual explicit PDF blobs seamlessly wrapping universally matching CSV tracking lists cleanly streaming massive bytes reliably preventing generalized timeouts explicitly.
acceptance_criteria: Limits explicit extraction isolating batches to generic 100 counts concurrently securely.

FR-19.title: Admin Flagging & Moderation Console
FR-19.description: Create explicit heavily guarded URL generic paths loading expansive specialized lists detailing explicitly flagged reasons natively permitting generic hard deletes cleanly cascading universally.
acceptance_criteria: Only SuperAdmins dynamically invoke suspending actions seamlessly bypassing regular generics.

FR-20.title: Develop Anonymized DEI Reporting Engine
FR-20.description: Configure isolated databases specifically hashing demographic arrays explicitly stripping specific identifiers grouping purely statistically rendering completely secure employer reports cleanly.
acceptance_criteria: Conceals groups completely explicitly if the returned set resolves fewer than specific 5 applicants securely preventing deduction natively.
